description: Combine great style with practical warmth when you wear this striped scarf from puma. Made of 100% acrylic and chunky rib knit, this scarf ensures you'll never be cold, while the knitted puma logo at one end and repeated stripes of black, white and red give it a sporty look. Length: 180cm Width: 20cm Washcare Hand wash with like colours Do not bleach Iron low Do not tumble dry
